name: Hockey Scoreboard Extended
author: hazplugins
description: Live, recent, and upcoming hockey games for PWHL and OHL — leagues not covered by the official hockey-scoreboard plugin.

api_requirements.name: PWHL API
api_requirements.description: Official PWHL REST API for scores and schedules
api_requirements.rate_limit: No official rate limit documented; use responsibly

api_requirements.name: OHL HockeyTech API
api_requirements.description: HockeyTech platform API used by the OHL
api_requirements.rate_limit: No official rate limit documented; use responsibly
